api_auth_intro: All API requests require a Bearer token in the Authorization header. Obtain your token from the GitLab repository or self-host.
api_blast_intro: The fastest way to use c4reqber from the command line. All commands support --help for detailed options.
api_cmd_solve: Standard discovery pipeline — full Z₃³ traversal
api_ep_verify: Verify a hypothesis against knowledge sources
api_hero_sub: Blast commands, REST endpoints, Python SDK, and 21 MCP tools. Everything you need to integrate.
api_mcp_intro: c4reqber exposes 21 Model Context Protocol tools for integration with Claude, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible agents.
api_mcp_prove: LLM-based hypothesis proving with iterative error correction
api_mcp_social: Social publishing — preprint upload, ORCID, multi-platform posting
api_mcp_solve: 7 阶段 HIL 发现流水线 (A→G)
api_reading_mcp: MCP Setup — Configure 21 MCP tools in Claude / Cursor
arch_cat_computing_engines: Graph Theory, Optimization, Cryptography, Distributed Systems
arch_cat_creative_engines: Music Theory, Visual Arts, Narrative Structure, Design Patterns
arch_cat_economics_engines: Game Theory, Market Dynamics, Auction Theory, Behavioral Econ
arch_cat_physics_engines: Thermodynamics, Electromagnetism, Quantum, Relativity, Fluid Dynamics
arch_cat_social_engines: Network Analysis, Opinion Dynamics, Crowd Behavior, Linguistics

arch_ext_theme: Custom TUI Theme: Override CSS variables in ~/.c4reqber/theme.css
arch_hero_sub: 47 knowledge sources. 38 simulation engines. One Z₃³ topology. O₀→O₁→O₂ observer. 23 core metaprograms.
arch_knowledge_intro: The Knowledge Layer aggregates information from 47 diverse sources, categorized into scientific, technical, commercial, and creative domains.
arch_layer_api_desc: REST + Python API — Programmatic access to all cognitive operations.
arch_layer_cli_desc: Command-line interface — blast commands, batch processing, CI/CD integration.
arch_layer_cognitive_desc: UCOS 4-layer cognitive pipeline — C4/ℤ₃³ topology engine, QZRF operators, CDI contradiction resolution, Theorem 9/11 validation.
arch_layer_knowledge_desc: 47 sources — arXiv, PubMed, Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex, Crossref, Zenodo, ClinicalTrials.gov, GBIF, NASA Earthdata, Materials Project, Kaggle, OpenFDA, ORCID, and more.
arch_layer_sim_desc: 38 engines — From thermodynamics to neural networks to game theory.
arch_layer_tui_desc: Terminal User Interface — Rich interactive dashboard for researchers. Built with Textual.
arch_pipeline_cdi: CDI (Creative & Destructive Insights) operates across all 4 layers to resolve contradictions and drive paradigm shifts. See the Theory page for mathematical details, formal proofs, and the 6 C4-META theorems.
arch_pipeline_intro: The C4-META theory is not just mathematics — it is the engine that drives every discovery. The cognitive layer runs the UCOS 4-layer pipeline:
arch_reading_api: API Reference — Programmatic access to all operations
arch_reading_docs: Documentation — Install and run your first discovery
arch_reading_theory: C4-META Theory — The mathematics behind the cognitive topology
arch_reading_wp: 技术白皮书 — 英文 · 俄文
arch_sec_audit: Audit logging for all cognitive transitions
arch_sec_degrade: Graceful degradation: if source fails, continue with remaining 50
arch_sec_validation: Input validation at every layer (Pydantic v2)
arch_sim_intro: Each engine models a different physical, mathematical, or social system. Problems are dispatched to the most appropriate engine based on their Z₃³ classification.
arch_ucos_l1_desc: IMPACT / COMPASS / TOTE execution loops. When thinking happens.
arch_ucos_l2_desc: 23 core metaprograms profiled into 3 agent perspectives. Perceptual filters that shape cognition.
arch_ucos_l3_desc: 14 QZRF operators transform states across the 27-state cognitive space.
arch_ucos_l4_desc: C4 = ℤ₃³ — 27 states. Coordinate system for navigation, pathfinding, and Theorem 9/11 validation.
aud_1_html:
1. PhD Students and Early-Career Researchers (Year 1–3)

Problem: "I know I'm interested in X, but I don't understand what's already been done and where the gaps are."

What c4reqber provides:

  • Literature review in 2 minutes instead of 2 weeks — 47 sources: arXiv, PubMed, Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex, Europe PMC, Crossref, Zenodo, and more
  • Structured gaps with potential assessment
  • Formulation of 3–5 competing hypotheses with falsifiable predictions
  • List of control experiments (DoE design)

Honesty: This is a starting point, not a final review. Hypotheses require expert verification — LLMs can hallucinate mechanisms.
aud_2_html:
2. Interdisciplinary Researchers

Problem: "I'm a biologist, but my problem requires physics/math/computer science. I don't know which tools from neighboring disciplines are applicable."

What c4reqber provides:

  • TRIZ analysis: 40 inventive principles applied to your problem
  • Isomorphisms: "Here are 3 similar problems from chemistry, solved with methods you don't know as a biologist"
  • C4 navigation across 27 cognitive states — structures chaotic thinking
  • Transfer pipeline: automatic analogy search between domains

Honesty: Works best when disciplines are close (biochemistry → biophysics). Quality drops for distant bridges (quantum mechanics → sociology).
aud_3_html:
3. Engineers and R&D Managers

Problem: "We need to improve a product/process, but the team is stuck in a local optimum."

What c4reqber provides:

  • TRIZ contradictions: "Increase speed without increasing energy consumption"
  • Patent landscape analysis (USPTO, OpenReview, Google Patents)
  • Structured "paradoxes" with proposed solutions
  • Simulations: CFD (OpenFOAM, FEniCSx), molecular dynamics (GROMACS, LAMMPS), multi-physics (MuJoCo, PyBullet)
aud_4_html:
4. Psychologists and Social Scientists

Problem: "My field is hard to formalize. Can AI even help study human behavior, therapy, or social phenomena?"

What c4reqber provides:

  • Literature search across psychological databases: PubMed (psychiatry), ClinicalTrials.gov, OpenReview, Harvard Dataverse, Kaggle
  • Causal inference (DoWhy, EconML, gCastle): "Does X affect Y?" with confounder control — critical for A/B tests in therapy
  • Agent models (Mesa, SimPy): modeling group behavior, norm diffusion, herding effects
  • Contradiction mining: finding contradictory claims in literature
  • TRIZ for social systems: 40 principles applicable to organizational problems

Honesty: c4reqber does not diagnose patients and does not replace a therapist. In social sciences, quality depends on data quality — if your niche has few peer-reviewed articles, LLMs will hallucinate. But for literature review, hypothesis structuring, and causal modeling, it is a powerful tool.
aud_5_html:
5. Clinical Researchers / Medical Doctors

Problem: "Need to design an RCT, find biomarkers, understand drug mechanism of action."

What c4reqber provides:

  • PubMed + Europe PMC + ClinicalTrials.gov + STRING + ChEMBL + PubChem
  • Causal inference for observational data: "Which factor actually causes the side effect?"
  • Simulations: pharmacokinetics (COPASI, Tellurium), PBPK models
  • Network pharmacology: STRING + Cytoscape-compatible output
aud_6_html:
6. Ecologists, Climatologists, Geographers

Problem: "Complex multi-factor systems, long time series, uncertainty in models."

What c4reqber provides:

  • GBIF (biodiversity), NASA Earthdata (satellite), USGS (geology), CERN (physics)
  • Bayesian models (PyMC, Stan): uncertainty quantification
  • Agent models: ecosystem simulations (predator-prey, invasive species)
  • Simulations: WRF (weather), FEniCSx (fluid dynamics for ocean modeling)
aud_7_html:
7. Data Scientists and ML Researchers

Problem: "Feature engineering, model selection, interpretation, causal claims from correlation data."

What c4reqber provides:

  • Kaggle + UCI ML Repository + Harvard Dataverse: dataset search
  • Causal inference: "Is this feature actually causal or just correlated?"
  • AutoML: automatic model enumeration (autoresearch layer)
  • Bayesian models: uncertainty quantification, model comparison (BMA)
  • Simulations: synthetic data generation for edge cases
aud_8_html:
8. Formal Verifiers / Theorists

Problem: "I have an idea, but I want to check it for contradictions formally."

What c4reqber provides:

  • Auto-generation of formal specification from natural language (Lean4, Coq, Dafny, Z3, Hoare)
  • Iterative compilation error correction (LLM → compile → error → fix loop)
  • Export proofs to .lean, .v, .smt2
  • MathDetector: automatic categorization of mathematical statements

Honesty: Auto-generation from natural language is not yet fully implemented. Works best if you explicitly provide the theorem statement.
aud_compare_html:
Honest Comparison with Analogues

ToolWhat it doesWhere c4reqber is betterWhere c4reqber is worse
Elicit / ConsensusLiterature search + summarizationStructured hypothesis with predictions, not just summaryUX is simpler in Elicit
SciSpaceReading papers with AI assistantCross-paper synthesis + contradiction detection + 47 sourcesNo inline PDF reader
ChatGPT / ClaudeGeneric Q&ADomain-aware simulation (38 engines), formal verification, TRIZ, causal inference, structured pipelineGeneric Q&A is sometimes more accurate for simple questions
MATLAB / MathematicaSimulations and computationHypothesis generation + literature search. MATLAB does neitherMATLAB has decades of industrial-grade solver refinement; our 38 engines span broader scientific domains at research-grade fidelity
aud_hero_sub: Who is c4reqber for? Honest assessment by research domain and TRL level.
aud_not_help_html:
Who It Does NOT Help (and Why)

WhoWhy it won't help
Experimenters who need dataThe system does not run experiments. It will say "you need to measure X" but won't measure X for you
Ultra-niche researchersIf your niche has <100 papers in 10 years, LLMs aren't trained on this data. Hypotheses will be generic or hallucinated
Those expecting guaranteed publishable resultsLLM generation is a creative trigger, not peer-reviewed science
Those who don't want to thinkThe system requires critical evaluation of output. Blind trust = noise
Practicing clinicians (treating patients)c4reqber is a research tool, not a diagnostic system. Do not use for diagnosis or treatment without peer review
aud_summary_html:
Summary

c4reqber is a research assistant at the level of "a very smart PhD student who read 200 papers over the weekend and proposed 5 hypotheses."

  • Does not replace: experiments, expertise, peer review, scientist intuition, therapeutic care
  • Accelerates: literature review, hypothesis formulation, structuring thinking, contradiction search, causal modeling, interdisciplinary transfer

If you expect c4reqber to "discover a new law of physics" — you will be disappointed.
If you expect c4reqber to "systematize your chaos of thoughts and point where to look next" — you will get exactly that.
aud_trl_html:
LevelMeaningCan c4reqber help?
TRL 1 — Basic principlesIdentify fundamental principlesYes. C4 navigation + 47 source literature search finds theory gaps
TRL 2 — Concept formulationFormulate a hypothesisYes. LLM generation with falsifiable predictions is a core feature
TRL 3 — Proof of conceptAnalytical or simulation proofPartially. 38 simulation engines show direction, but these are toy models
TRL 4 — Lab validationLaboratory validationNo. The system has no hands, eyes, or reagents
TRL 5–9Pilot, field validation, commercializationNo. Out of scope

Conclusion: c4reqber operates at TRL 1–3. It helps move from "I have a problem" to "I have a structured hypothesis with mechanism, predictions, and literature list." Everything beyond that requires a human with a lab, data, or mathematical apparatus.
c4_desc: 离散群论认知空间。不是神经网络。不是符号规则。数学拓扑。
cl_install_desc: 一条命令。需要 Python 3.11+。自带 API 密钥（OpenRouter、Mistral 等）。重负载模拟可选配 GPU。
cl_sub: 用通俗的语言 — 无需专业术语。
cl_use_desc: blast solve "你的问题" 用于单次运行。blast turbo 用于范式提案。blast tui 用于可视化驾驶舱。blast serve --mcp 用于 AI 代理。
cl_what_desc: 一个以终端为先的研究助手。你提出一个科学问题——c4reqber 搜索 47 个文献来源、运行模拟、检查证明，并撰写一份经过质量门控的研究提案。不是聊天机器人，是一条流水线。
comp_desc: 不是 LLM 包装器。认知操作系统。
comp_2026_html:
2026 年新一代科学 AI 产品——它们究竟是什么

这些产品并不等价。Claude Science 是研究工作流层面最接近的竞争者；GPT‑Rosalind 主要在生命科学垂直领域竞争；Prism 主要覆盖论文写作与出版准备层。

产品实际范围领先之处相对 c4reqber 的局限
Claude Science付费测试版科学工作台，包含通用协调代理、60 多项技能与连接器，并支持本地、SSH 或 HPC 执行。原则上可跨领域，但目前最强的是计算生命科学。具有完整溯源的可复现产物、原生科学图形、计算资源编排和审阅代理。闭源且付费；当前领域包明显偏向生物学。尚未公布形式化证明栈、C4/TRIZ 推理或广泛的内置仿真目录。
GPT‑Rosalind面向生物学、药物发现和转化医学的受控访问模型，可通过 Codex 插件使用 50 多种科学工具。针对蛋白质、基因和化学的专门生化推理，以及实验规划和工具密集型工作流。仅向合格机构开放的生命科学预览版，并非通用跨领域工作台；尚未公布形式化验证栈。
Prism免费的云端 LaTeX 科学写作与协作环境，GPT‑5.2 可理解完整文档上下文。整篇稿件编辑、公式、引文、图形和实时协作，无需本地配置 LaTeX。不是自主研究员；不具备实验室/HPC 编排、领域仿真、因果流水线或形式化验证。

评估日期：2026 年 7 月 13 日。第一手来源：Claude Science · GPT‑Rosalind · Prism。

doc_faq_a1: 为 AI 代理和人类研究者打造的认知外骨骼。38 个模拟引擎桥接、47 个知识源、形式化验证、Z₃³ 拓扑，以及 O₀→O₁→O₂ 观察者——将问题转化为经门控的研究提案。
doc_faq_a2: 免费且开源（AGPL-3.0）。你只需为 LLM API 调用付费。一次完整流水线运行的费用根据层级在 $0.002–$0.11 之间。
doc_faq_a3: 不需要。GPU 是可选的。Apple Silicon（MLX）和 NVIDIA CUDA 可加速模拟；核心流水线在 CPU 上运行。
doc_faq_a4: macOS 和 Linux 均已完整测试。Windows 可能可以在 WSL2 下运行。
doc_sub: 安装、配置和运行 c4reqber 所需的一切。从第一次 pip install 到范式转变提案。

home_verify_desc: Your hypotheses don't just claim — they prove. Auto-selected by domain.
keys_full_html:
本页是快速参考。完整的双语指南（英文 + 俄文，涵盖社交发布、故障排查）位于 GitLab 仓库：

📄 docs/API_KEYS.md（GitLab）→

另外：仓库根目录下的 .env.example 列出了所有变量。
keys_hero_sub: LLM 提供商与 47 个知识源的 BYOK 设置。已于 2026 年 7 月验证。
keys_intro: c4reqber 免费（AGPL-3.0）— 仅向上游 API 付费。最低要求：secrets.env 或环境中的 OPENROUTER_API_KEY。TUI Setup Hub：Ctrl+Shift+K。
keys_llm_html:
服务环境变量注册地址等待时间备注
DeepSeekDEEPSEEK_API_KEYplatform.deepseek.com邮箱 + 短信需要在 Billing 中充值
xAI GrokXAI_API_KEYconsole.x.ai即时约 $25 促销额度
NVIDIA NIMNVIDIA_API_KEYbuild.nvidia.com即时nvapi-...，无需信用卡
keys_nokey_html:
arXiv、PubMed（没有 NCBI 密钥会较慢）、Crossref（CROSSREF_MAILTO）、Europe PMC、DOAJ、Zenodo、PubChem、ChEMBL、ClinicalTrials.gov、Inspire-HEP、DBLP、OpenReview、CyberLeninka、Math-Net.Ru 等更多来源。

完整列表见 src/knowledge/config.py → SOURCE_REGISTRY。
keys_pending_html:
• Semantic Scholar — SEMANTIC_SCHOLAR_API_KEY — 申请表 — 1–2 个工作日
  • BASE (Bielefeld) — BASE_API_KEY — 申请 + 使用场景说明 — 数天
  • DataCite — DATACITE_API_KEY — 人工审批
  • OMIM — OMIM_API_KEY — 人工审批
  • DrugBank — 仅限付费；未配置时使用占位数据
keys_required_html:
服务环境变量注册地址等待时间费用
OpenRouterOPENROUTER_API_KEYopenrouter.ai/keys确认邮箱免费 :free 模型

创建密钥 → 复制 sk-or-...（仅显示一次）。免费层无需信用卡。

OpenAlexOPENALEX_API_KEYopenalex.org可选
STRING DBSTRING_DB_API_KEYstring-db.org即时

GBIFGBIF_USER + passwordgbif.org即时

keys_search_html:
服务环境变量注册地址费用（2026 年 7 月）
Brave SearchBRAVE_API_KEYbrave.com/search/api需要信用卡；每月 $5 额度

keys_setup_note: blast init 或 blast config keys --assign KEY=value → ~/.c4reqber/secrets.env。TUI：Ctrl+Shift+K。覆盖目录：C4REQBER_CONFIG。切勿提交密钥。
keys_updated: 最后验证：2026 年 7 月 11 日
mcpdoc_hero_sub: Connect c4reqber to Claude, Cursor, Cline, and any MCP-compatible agent.
mcpdoc_quick_intro: Add c4reqber to your MCP client configuration:
mcpdoc_registry_intro: c4reqber MCP server will be listed on major registries:
mcpdoc_tool_abductive_desc: Generate and rank explanatory hypotheses (Inference to the Best Explanation).
mcpdoc_tool_causal_desc: Discover causal relationships using Pearl's do-calculus.
mcpdoc_tool_dynamics_desc: Simulate feedback loops using Stock-Flow DSL.
mcpdoc_tool_fingerprint_desc: Classify a problem into the C4 cognitive space (Z₃³, 27 states).
mcpdoc_tool_lean_desc: Formally verify a discovery using Lean 4 theorem prover.
mcpdoc_tool_paradigm_desc: Detect paradigm shifts in scientific literature.
mcpdoc_tool_search_desc: Unified search across 47 federated knowledge sources.
mcpdoc_tool_simulate_desc: Run a scientific simulation pattern against a hypothesis.
mcpdoc_tool_triz_desc: Solve engineering contradictions using the TRIZ 39×39 matrix.
mcpdoc_tools_intro: c4reqber exposes 21 MCP tools for cognitive operations (blast_* + c4_* families).
meta_desc_api: c4reqber API reference: blast commands, REST endpoints, Python SDK, 21 MCP tools.
meta_desc_arch: C4REQBER system architecture: 47 knowledge sources, 38 simulation engines, Z₃³ topology, O₀→O₁→O₂ observer, 23 core metaprograms.
meta_desc_aud: c4reqber 适合谁？博士生、跨学科研究者、工程师、心理学家等。
meta_desc_discoveries: 六个经过验证的 blast turbo 研究提案，涵盖文献搜索、模拟和质量门控。
meta_desc_docs: 安装、配置和运行 c4reqber。快速入门、GPU 设置、面向 AI 代理的 MCP。
meta_desc_gpu: 为 c4reqber 配置 GPU 加速。NVIDIA CUDA、Apple Metal、AMD ROCm，以及通过 vast.ai 使用云端 GPU。
meta_desc_gs: 安装 c4reqber，运行你的第一次发现，配置 MCP。5 分钟从零实现范式转变。
meta_desc_home: 面向 AI 代理的认知外骨骼。38 个模拟桥接、9 个验证器、47 个知识源、21 个 MCP 工具、TUI v9.18。
meta_desc_keys: 注册 OpenRouter、NCBI、CORE、Tavily 以及 20 多个科学知识源的免费 API 密钥。c4reqber 的 BYOK 分步指南。
meta_desc_mcp: 为 Claude、Cursor、Cline 及其他兼容 MCP 的代理配置 c4reqber 的 MCP 工具。
meta_desc_showcase: 查看 c4reqber 的实际效果：blast turbo 演示、TUI v9 快照、2026 年 7 月已验证的提案。
meta_desc_theory: C4-META Theory — ℤ₃³ cognitive topology, 27 states, 14 QZRF operators, UCOS 4-layer architecture, CDI algorithm, and Agda-verified formal proofs.
os_windows_status: ✗ 未测试 · WSL2 可能可用
page_title_aud: 研究受众 — c4reqber 文档
page_title_gpu: GPU 设置 — c4reqber 文档
page_title_home: c4reqber — 面向 AI 代理的认知外骨骼
page_title_keys: API 密钥 — c4reqber 文档
page_title_mcp: MCP 设置 — c4reqber 文档
pip_scope_note: 注意： pip install c4reqber 仅安装 Python 包 + CLI。外部模拟引擎（GROMACS、OpenFOAM 等）需要单独安装。参见 docs/setup/gpu.html。
price_desc: 每次完整流水线运行从 $0.002 到 $0.11。按阶段配置。
pt_desc: 7 个阶段。每个阶段都有自己的 LLM 模型、插件和认知策略。
pt_swap: 每个阶段的模型均可完全配置——在配置文件中自由更换。
pt_title: 流水线阶段 — 每阶段一个模型
qs_academic_hint: 学术提示：使用 --verify 标志自动调用 Lean4/Coq 进行定理检查。
qs_sub: 三条命令。五分钟。你的第一次发现。
roadmap_desc: 持续交付模拟引擎、AI 集成和验证后端。
roadmap_v55_body:
✓ 类型安全：0 个 mypy 错误（1095 个文件）
✓ MCP 21 工具 + JSON Schema
✓ Virtual Bio + GPU 自动检测
✓ 38 个模拟引擎桥接
✓ TUI v9.18 驾驶舱 + blast tui 命令
roadmap_v56_body:
✓ 死代码清理（删除 6 个模块 + 孤立测试）
✓ 14 个 API 密钥接入 MultiSourceSearcher
✓ Pydantic V2 迁移（ConfigDict、field_validator）
✓ 引用验证器带幻觉检测
✓ TUI v8 立方吉祥物重写 + Go 审计（staticcheck 0）
✓ 集成观察者位置移位 O₀→O₁→O₂
✓ Pipeline 步骤 s4 中的 23 个核心元程序
✓ 每次 solve() 调用重置成本追踪器
roadmap_v57_body:
○ JuliaDiff 自动微分
○ LangGraph 状态机代理
○ Unsloth 本地 LLM 微调
○ vLLM 高吞吐推理
○ ChromaDB / LanceDB RAG 层
○ CrewAI 多代理编排
show_step1_desc: 打开驾驶舱——一览当前问题、引擎状态和最新发现。
show_step2_desc: 一条命令即可触发完整的 HIL 流水线：搜索、缺口分析、模拟、验证、论文撰写。
show_step3_desc: 质量门控会拦截劣质内容。只有通过字数和占位符检查的文本才会被保存。
show_sub: 查看 c4reqber 的实际运行效果。真实的查询、真实的发现、真实的可视化。
show_tui_sub: 2026 年 7 月任务的黄金快照 · 完整画廊 →
show_verified_desc: 六个 blast turbo 研究提案——文献、缺口、模拟、质量门控。含视频的完整画廊 →
show_verified_disclaimer: 仅为假设——未经同行评审。每份文件均附带认识论免责声明。
sources_desc: 没有幻觉引用。每个引用都通过 DOI 在实时数据库中验证。
sources_title: 47 个知识来源 — 真实引用
splash_tagline: 为人类和 AI 代理打造的认知外骨骼
splash_tagline_caps: 为 AI 代理与人类打造的认知外骨骼
sysreq_desc: macOS 和 Linux 已测试并受支持。Windows 未测试。外部引擎需要单独安装。
th_cube_desc: 27 discrete states across Time, Scale, and Agency. Click any state to explore. Drag to rotate.
th_hero_sub:
Discrete group-theoretic cognitive space.
27 states across 3 axes — Time, Scale, Agency.
Mathematical topology with Agda-verified proofs.
Not neural networks. Not symbolic rules.
A coordinate system for general intelligence.
th_js_desc_000: Personal concrete memories. Historical experiments you ran.
th_js_desc_001: Concrete memories of others. Historical data you observed.
th_js_desc_002: Concrete system history. Raw experimental logs.
th_js_desc_010: Personal abstract reflection. "What did I learn?"
th_js_desc_011: Abstract analysis of others. Typical academic review.
th_js_desc_012: Abstract system patterns. Meta-analysis of literature.
th_js_desc_021: Meta-analysis of others. Theory of mind.
th_js_desc_100: Present concrete self. Current experiment setup.
th_js_desc_101: Present concrete other. Observing a colleague.
th_js_desc_110: Present abstract self. "What am I doing now?"
th_js_desc_111: Present abstract other. Standard academic analysis.
th_js_desc_120: Present meta self. Mindfulness in research.
th_js_desc_122: Present meta system. Active paradigm construction.
th_js_desc_200: Future concrete self. Personal research plan.
th_js_desc_201: Future concrete other. Predicting a colleague's results.
th_js_desc_210: Future abstract self. "Where is my field going?"
th_js_desc_211: Future abstract other. Forecasting a competitor.
th_js_desc_220: Future meta self. Personal paradigm shift.
th_js_desc_221: Future meta other. Predicting scientific revolutions.
th_js_desc_222: Future meta system. Paradigm-shifting vision. The Einstein state.
theory_c4_desc: 认知在离散的三维空间中运作：时间 × 规模 × 主体性，每个维度有 3 个值。总计：27 个状态。这是通用智能的最小完整结构——通过群论和范畴论验证。
theory_c4_operators_desc: 每个算子都具有周期 3——应用三次即回到原始状态。它们满足交换律，构成一个阿贝尔群。
theory_c4_state_000: F⟨0,0,0⟩ — 过去、具体、自我：个人记忆，你曾进行的历史实验
theory_c4_state_111: F⟨1,1,1⟩ — 当下、抽象、他者：典型的学术分析（大多数论文所做的事）
theory_c4_state_222: F⟨2,2,2⟩ — 未来、元、系统：系统层面的未来愿景（范式转变）
theory_cdi_desc: 突破并非来自渐进式步骤。它们需要对遥远认知状态的可控遍历——暂时占据打破当前假设的不兼容位置。CDI 是一个利用定理 11（直径 ≤ 6）保证有界搜索的 6 步算法。
theory_cdi_einstein: 爱因斯坦的洞见代表了最大距离的概念飞跃——这正是 C4 对革命性突破的预测。搜索复杂度为 O(1)，因为状态空间是有界的。
theory_cdi_step_1: 提取物理矛盾 — 识别「X 必须同时是 A 和非 A」的冲突
theory_cdi_step_2: 生成指纹 — 将矛盾映射到 C4 状态坐标
theory_cdi_step_3: 预测解区域 — 默认目标：F⟨2,2,2⟩（未来、元、系统）
theory_cdi_step_4: 计算路径 — 通过定理 9（汉明距离）求最短路径
theory_cdi_step_5: 执行变换 — 沿路径应用 QZRF 算子
theory_cdi_step_6: 综合与验证 — 通过爱因斯坦测试和证伪进行验证
theory_cdi_title: CDI — 创造性及破坏性洞见
theory_meta_desc: C4-META 用 6 个关于观察者作为认知宇宙之间不变同构的定理扩展了 C4。该框架在 6 个模块的约 3,600 行 Agda（安全模式，无 K）中形式化。
theory_meta_th_1: 观察者桥接 — O₂ 在认知宇宙之间诱导出同构 U ≅ U′
theory_meta_th_2: 观察者不变量 — 观察者结构在宇宙同构下保持不变
theory_meta_th_3: 不可计算性 — O₂ 无法由 O₀/O₁ 计算（类型不匹配：SelfCode → SelfCode 与监控）
theory_meta_th_4: 涌现保证 — 自修改架构在不动点处保证 O₂ 的出现
theory_meta_th_5: 观察者叠加 — 系统处于多个 O 层级的叠加态，直到被「测量」
theory_meta_th_6: 共情收敛 — 对齐的系统收敛到 Φ = F⟨1,1,1⟩；9 个危险状态变得不可达
theory_meta_title: C4-META — 观察者作为不变量
theory_mp_desc: MPRotationStep 使用不同的 MP 组合创建 3 个代理配置。每个配置生成关键见解和盲点。SynthesisStep 整合它们，通过感知滤镜旋转消除认知盲点。
theory_mp_title: 23 元程序 → 3 个代理配置
theory_observer_desc: 认知不仅关乎状态——还关乎谁观察它们。观察者位置增加了用模态逻辑 ◯ₙ 建模的元认知维度。每个级别看到 27 状态空间的不同子集。
theory_observer_title: 观察者位置 — O₀ / O₁ / O₂
theory_observer_use: c4reqber 在管道执行期间使用观察者转移：O₀ 用于正常处理，O₁ 用于自我诊断覆盖（~10–20% 开销），O₂ 用于卡住时的全局架构重组。
theory_phi_desc: C4-META 的理论构造：现在、抽象和他人对齐的收敛点。27 状态空间的几何在 Φ 周围创建了一个自然盆地，18 个状态在可达范围内，9 个遥远。在 compassion-convergence.agda 证明模块中探讨。
theory_proofs_agda: Agda — 6 个模块，约 3,600 行（--safe --without-K）。完整证明见 adaptive-topology/formal-proofs。c4reqber 包含与已验证定理相匹配的结构化占位实现。
theory_proofs_coq: Coq — 进行中。用于硬件验证场景的归纳证明。
theory_proofs_desc: 核心定理在多个证明辅助工具中得到验证。T1–T11（C4 属性）和 T12–T17（范畴必然性、观察者定理）经过机器检查。
theory_proofs_lean4: Lean4 — 进行中。用依赖类型论对 C4Comp 进行形式化。
theory_qzrf_desc: QZRF（量子 Z 区 递归 波动）是拓扑结构（C4）和静态内容（元程序）之间的「脉搏」。其14 个算子将72 个 Matrix Dream 微模式聚合为 5 个基于相位的转换组。每个算子针对特定的 C4 状态。
theory_reading_docs_desc: 安装并运行你的第一条发现流水线
theory_reading_showcase_desc: 使用 c4reqber 完成的真实发现
theory_ucos_desc: UCOS 将每个组件集成到一个单一的分析框架中。它映射查询如何从流程流向拓扑并返回。
theory_ucos_flow: 查询进入第 1 层（进程），由第 2 层（23 个核心元程序）进行概要分析，在第 4 层（C4 坐标）中定位，并由第 3 层（QZRF 算子）进行转换，直到达到目标状态。
theory_why3_desc: 三个梯度是极性对立（过去/未来、具体/元、自我/系统）之间非线性插值的最小值。二元太粗糙；四元浪费状态。27 状态空间已针对 18 条历史科学家发现路径进行验证。
theory_why_p1: 现代人工智能生成文本。它不会思考。c4reqber 建立在一种认知数学理论之上，该理论将思维视为在离散状态空间中的导航——就像 GPS 在坐标中导航一样。
theory_why_p2: 每个研究问题都会获得一个认知坐标 F⟨时间, 规模, 主体性⟩。然后系统计算到目标状态的最短路径，选择转换算子，并根据形式定理验证每一步。这不是比喻——定理在约 3,600 行 Agda 中得到验证：gitlab.com/cognitive-functors/Adaptive-topology/-/tree/main/formal-proofs。
trust_desc: 类型安全。经实战检验。透明。
trust_feat_audit_desc: 多代理自动审计、静态分析（mypy、Bandit）和社区安全审查。
trust_feat_proofs_desc: Lean4、Coq、Dafny、Agda、Z3 — 每个形式证明都经过机器检查。不含糊。
trust_feat_sandbox_desc: 模拟引擎在隔离环境中运行。无 shell 注入。阻止路径遍历。符号链接防护。
trust_feat_sanitize_desc: 每个 LLM 输入都经过净化。Nonce 分隔符、LaTeX 转义、HTML 实体解码。故障关闭。
uc_clinical_desc: 随机对照试验设计、生物标志物、药物相互作用。PubMed + ClinicalTrials.gov + STRING。
uc_eco_desc: 生物多样性、气候建模、海洋动力学。GBIF + NASA Earthdata + WRF。
uc_hard_desc: 物理、化学、生物、材料。TRIZ + 38 个模拟引擎桥接 + 形式化验证。
uc_law_desc: 法律推理、判例分析、监管影响。多司法管辖区 + 时序推理。
uc_psych_desc: 认知行为疗法元分析、组织行为、政治心理学。因果推断 + 智能体模型。
usecases_desc: 从硬科学到社会科学 — c4reqber 适应您的领域。
gs_setup_packages: blast setup — 科学计算包（GROMACS、OpenMM 等）
gs_setup_keys: blast init 或 blast config keys — 密钥 → ~/.c4reqber/secrets.env
home_social_tui_hint: TUI：Ctrl+Shift+S — 草稿、健康检查、发布
home_social_post_hint: CLI：blast social publish · blast social post --id … --platform mastodon
home_social_platform_note: Zenodo = 真实 DOI 上传。arXiv = 仅 LaTeX 包（无自动提交）。bioRxiv = 尚未接入。无 API 密钥的频道会跳过。
doc_card_social_desc: Zenodo、ORCID、Mastodon、Bluesky、Telegram、Reddit、Discord、Slack — 配置 + blast social post。限制见文档。
gs_next_social: 社交发布指南 — Zenodo、ORCID、Mastodon、Bluesky…
gs_tui_intro: 运行 blast tui。快捷键（亦可通过 : 面板）：
gs_tui_keys_html:
• Ctrl+Shift+K — API 密钥 Setup Hub
  • Ctrl+Shift+S — 社交发布
  • Shift+A — 研究议程
  • Ctrl+Shift+M — 模型与 council
  • Ctrl+Shift+C — 仿真能力
  • : — 命令面板
